creator: kientzle@acm.org
text:
> test_read_format_zip_high_compression
> test_write_disk_secure745
> test_write_disk_secure746a
> test_write_disk_secure746b

Those are new tests to exercise known failures that have not yet been addressed.

> Also, it looks like test_write_disk_secure744 is failing to clean up after itself ...

Libarchive's test harness deliberately does not clean up the test directory for failing tests so that intermediate results and detailed logs can be studied.
